title: APM: Octo Demo OSQuery Host Evidence
description: Host-level OSQuery findings emitted by the Octo attack lab, grouped by compromised host, instance OCID, query name, and severity so investigators can pivot from APM trace context to VM evidence.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' != null and 'OSQuery Query' != null | stats count as Findings, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, unique('OSQuery Finding') as FindingSamples, unique('OSQuery SQL') as QuerySQL by 'Host Name', 'Instance OCID', 'OSQuery Query', 'Security Severity' | sort -Findings
falsepositives: Expected host-evidence records when a demo operator runs the attack-lab workflow.

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize the OSQuery findings by compromised host and map them to the related Attack ID.
Which host evidence is strongest for the VM-compromise stage?
